nodes.label: Phase 5 result-format (binding presentation contract)
nodes.rationale: Enforces mechanical consistency across rungs: one plotting module (plot_p5.py), the locked visual constants and array schema, the metric dictionary (composing-depth, probe-capacity, expected-compute), the 8-slot summary contract, and the pre-submit checklist — kills drift in graphs/tables/summaries/continuity.

nodes.label: The result-format contract as an anti-drift enforcement mechanism
nodes.rationale: Names the four predictable rot modes (graph-format drift, table-style drift, summary-voice drift, no rung-to-rung continuity) and kills them mechanically via one plotting module, one 8-slot summary template, one ledger schema, and a pre-submit checklist gating every rung — not advisory, the spec the run code must conform to.
